title: Auto Cell Freeze
description: Automatically make notebook cells read-only after they are executed.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Turn the extension on or off. When off, executed cells are no longer frozen, frozen cells are not dimmed, pinned, or blocked from re-executing, and pasted cells are left untouched. Cells already frozen in a saved notebook stay read-only, because that is stored in their own metadata.

paths.title: Paths
paths.description: Glob patterns (server-relative, '/'-separated, no leading slash) selecting which notebooks the extension acts on. An empty list (the default) means every notebook. Supports '*' (matches within a path segment), '**' (matches across '/', including zero segments so 'a/**/b' matches 'a/b'), and '?' (a single non-'/' character). Matching is case-sensitive and anchored to the full path. The 'Enabled' switch still applies on top: when off, the extension is inactive everywhere regardless of this list.
